channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VSL] Viram Suvarn Ltd Receives Trading Approval from BSE for 3,78,20,426 Equity Shares
item.description:
Viram Suvarn Ltd has announced that it has received trading approval from BSE Limited for 3,78,20,426 fully paid up equity shares of Rs.2 each. The shares were allotted pursuant to right basis. The approval was received on 5th March, 2026 and the trading of these shares will commence from 6th March, 2026.

  • Viram Suvarn Ltd has received trading approval from BSE Limited for 3,78,20,426 equity shares.
  • The shares were allotted pursuant to right basis.
  • The trading of these shares will commence from 6th March, 2026.
  • The approval was received on 5th March, 2026.
  • The shares are fully paid up and of Rs.2 each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veeram Securities Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KOVAI] Kovai Medical Center & Hospital Ltd Approves Re-Appointment of Two Independent Directors
item.description:
Kovai Medical Center & Hospital Ltd announced that the Board of Directors approved the re-appointment of Mr.A.P.Ammasaikutti and Dr.K.Kolandaswamy as Non-Executive Independent Directors for a second term of five years, subject to the approval of shareholders through Postal ballot. The Board also approved the Postal Ballot Notice to seek approval of the Shareholders for the re-appointment of the directors.

  • Re-appointment of Mr.A.P.Ammasaikutti and Dr.K.Kolandaswamy as Non-Executive Independent Directors
  • Approval of the Board for the re-appointment for a second term of five years
  • Postal ballot notice to seek approval of the Shareholders for the re-appointment
  • Mr.A.P.Ammasaikutti's present term ends on 2nd June 2026 and Dr.K.Kolandaswamy's present term ends on 31st July 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOVAI MEDICAL CENTER & HOSPITAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUVEN] Suven Life Sciences Allots 3,17,68,764 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Suven Life Sciences Ltd. has allotted 3,17,68,764 equity shares of Rs.1/- each to JASTI PROPERTY AND EQUITY HOLDINGS PRIVATE LIMITED at an issue price of Rs. 134/- per share on preferential basis. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 3,17,68,764 fully paid warrants. The company has received the entire consideration amount of Rs. 425,70,14,376/- from the allottee. The paid-up equity share capital of the company stands increased to Rs. 26,37,20,583/- consisting of 26,37,20,583 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 1/- each.

  • Suven Life Sciences has allotted 3,17,68,764 equity shares to JASTI PROPERTY AND EQUITY HOLDINGS PRIVATE LIMITED.
  • The allotment is at an issue price of Rs. 134/- per share on preferential basis.
  • The allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 3,17,68,764 fully paid warrants.
  • The entire consideration amount of Rs. 425,70,14,376/- has been received from the allottee.
  • The paid-up equity share capital of the company stands increased to Rs. 26,37,20,583/- consisting of 26,37,20,583 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 1/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUVEN LIFE SCIENCES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SUVEN] Suven Life Sciences Allots 3,17,68,764 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Suven Life Sciences Ltd has allotted 3,17,68,764 equity shares of Rs.1/- each to Jasti Property and Equity Holdings Private Limited at an issue price of Rs. 134/- per share on preferential basis. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 3,17,68,764 fully paid warrants. The company has received the entire consideration amount of Rs. 425,70,14,376/- from the allottee. The paid-up equity share capital of the company stands increased to Rs. 26,37,20,583/- consisting of 26,37,20,583 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 1/- each.

  • Suven Life Sciences allotted 3,17,68,764 equity shares on preferential basis
  • Allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 3,17,68,764 fully paid warrants
  • Issue price of Rs. 134/- per share
  • Received entire consideration amount of Rs. 425,70,14,376/-
  • Paid-up equity share capital of the company stands increased to Rs. 26,37,20,583/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUVEN LIFE SCIENCES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SHAREINDIA] Share India Securities Ltd Appoints Mr. Arun Kumar Jain as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Share India Securities Ltd has appointed Mr. Arun Kumar Jain (DIN: 07563704) as an Additional Director designated as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective from the date of receipt of approvals from the Exchanges. Mr. Jain's appointment is for a term of five consecutive years, i.e., up to March 04, 2031, subject to the approval of the Shareholders of the Company. Mr. Jain is a distinguished professional with extensive experience in taxation, finance, and corporate governance. He has served in several senior and eminent positions within the Department of Revenue and has been serving as a Non-Executive Independent Director on the Board of GHCL Limited since April 1, 2019. His vast knowledge, experience, and strategic acumen will significantly strengthen the Company’s governance framework.

  • Appointment of Mr. Arun Kumar Jain as an Additional Director designated as a Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Mr. Jain's appointment is for a term of five consecutive years, i.e., up to March 04, 2031.
  • Mr. Jain is a distinguished professional with extensive experience in taxation, finance, and corporate governance.
  • He has served in several senior and eminent positions within the Department of Revenue.
  • Mr. Jain has been serving as a Non-Executive Independent Director on the Board of GHCL Limited since April 1, 2019.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Share India Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HSCL] Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd Clarifies No Price Sensitive Information Disclosed
item.description:
In response to a letter seeking clarification on increased volumes, Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd confirmed their compliance with SEBI regulations. The company assured prompt disclosure of any material events, but stated there is no undisclosed or price sensitive information at present.

  • Company confirms compliance with SEBI regulations
  • No undisclosed or price sensitive information at present
  • Assures prompt disclosure of any material events in future

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SUMEETINDS] Sumeet Industries Ltd. Holds Analyst/Investor Meeting; No UPSI Shared
item.description:
Sumeet Industries Ltd. recently held an analyst/investor meeting on March 5, 2025, at 4:00 PM. The meeting was conducted in a Q&A format, with no presentation made by the company officials. Notably, no Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) was shared during the interactions. This update follows the earlier intimation made on February 27, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Sumeet Industries Ltd. held an analyst/investor meeting on March 5, 2025
  • The meeting was conducted in a Q&A format
  • No presentation was made by the company officials
  • No Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) was shared
  • This update follows the earlier intimation made on February 27, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUMEET INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GOELCONS] Goel Construction Company Ltd Receives 'Crisil A-/Stable' Long Term Rating from CRISIL
item.description:
Goel Construction Company Ltd has announced that Crisil Ratings Limited ('CRISIL') has assigned a long term rating of 'Crisil A-/Stable' to its total bank loan facilities amounting to 2150 Crore. The short term rating assigned is 'Crisil A2+'. These ratings can be viewed on CRISIL's website.

  • Goel Construction Company Ltd has been assigned a long term rating of 'Crisil A-/Stable' by CRISIL
  • The total bank loan facilities rated by CRISIL amount to 2150 Crore
  • The short term rating assigned is 'Crisil A2+'
  • The ratings can be viewed on CRISIL's website
  • This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Goel Construction Company Ltd | Category: Rating

item.title: [RAJESH] Rajesh Power Services Ltd Subsidiary Signs Battery Energy Storage Purchase Agreement with Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited for 65 MW / 130 MWh Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rajesh Power Projects Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Rajesh Power Services Limited, has signed a Battery Energy Storage Purchase Agreement (BESPA) with state-run Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (GUVNL) for the development of a 65 MW / 130 MWh standalone Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project at Virpore in Gujarat. The project is expected to be commissioned within 18 months from the date of signing of the agreement and will operate under a 12-year agreement from the date of commissioning at a contracted tariff of INR 1.89 lakh per MW per month.

  • Rajesh Power Services Ltd subsidiary signs BESPA with GUVNL for 65 MW / 130 MWh BESS project in Gujarat.
  • Project to operate under a 12-year agreement from the date of commissioning at a contracted tariff of INR 1.89 lakh per MW per month.
  • Project involves a 65 MW battery system with a storage capacity of 130 MWh, capable of supplying power for up to two hours.
  • Project expected to be commissioned within 18 months from the date of signing of the agreement.
  • Gujarat emerging as a leading state in deploying grid-scale battery storage.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajesh Power Services Ltd | Category: Battery Energy Storage

item.title: [MOUNT] Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd. to Shift Registered Office and Approve Related Party Contracts
item.description:
Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd. announced a change of registered office within the same city and ROC jurisdiction, and approved contracts with related parties at a board meeting on March 05, 2026. The board also approved the reappointment of Ms. Monalisa Datta as secretarial auditor for the financial year 2024-2025 and the re-appointment of the internal auditor. The meeting took place from 04.00 p.m. to 07:00 p.m.

  • Change of registered office within the same city and ROC jurisdiction
  • Approval of contracts with related parties
  • Reappointment of Ms. Monalisa Datta as secretarial auditor for 2024-2025
  • Re-appointment of the internal auditor

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Business Update
